<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">Strategy Needs Creativity: </span></b><span style="font-size: 21px">An analytic framework alone wonŐt reinvent your business</span><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">Gap between what students want to learn and what theyŐd like to learn about strategy. </span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">Professors teach students to think about strategy problems by introducing them to rigorous analytical toolsŃassessing the five forces, drawing a value net, plotting competitive positions</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">understanding an existing business context than to dreaming up ways to reshape it.</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">they know, are born of creative thinking: a spark of intuition, a connection between different ways of thinking, a leap into the unexpected</span></li>
<li><b><span style="font-size: 21px">Analytical tools help:  </span></b><span style="font-size: 21px">with</span><b><span style="font-size: 21px"> </span></b><span style="font-size: 21px">understanding competitive landscapes and to assess how companies can best deploy their resources and competencies there</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">Giving tools to people will not help them break conventional ways of thinking</span></li>
<li><b><span style="font-size: 21px">How to foster creativity in strategy? </span></b></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">Elon Musk seems to have a knack for strategy built on contrast. With SpaceX he is attempting to overturn major assumptions about space travel: that it must occur on a fixed schedule, be paid for by the public, and use onetime rockets.</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 21px">Smarter Faster Better about introducing carefully chosen creative ŇdisturbancesÓ into work processes to spur new thinking. Youngme Moon, in ŇBreak Free from the Product Life CycleÓ (HBR, May 2005), suggests redefining products by boldly limitingŃrather than augmentingŃthe features offered</span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></li>
</ul>

<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></div>

<li><b><span style="font-size: 21px">Roots </span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">in the </span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">Mi</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">litar</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">y strateg</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">y</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></li>
<li><b><span style="font-size: 21px">Corporate str</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">ategy</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"> is </span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">deeply</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"> imb</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">ued wit</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">h militar</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">y</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"> refere</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">nces</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"> - </span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">chief </span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">executive officers</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">, in he</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">adquar</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">ters</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">, </span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">troops </span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">on the </span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">front line</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">s</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></b></li>

<li><b><span style="font-size: 21px">Structuralist </span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">view</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">, </span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">or </span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">env</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">iro</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">nmental </span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">deter</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">minism</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px"> </span></b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></li>

<div><span style="font-size: 21px"><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/png;base64,"/><br></span><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></div>
<div><b><u><span style="font-size: 24px">For Dennis New Ventures:</span></u></b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 24px"><h2>Session 2 Đ Saturday January 21, 2023 (8:30 AM to 5:00 PM)</h2></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 24px"><h2>Financing: Venture and Risk Capital Alternatives</h2></span></b></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">The purpose of this session is to expose participants to the issues in venture and risk capital decision making from both the entrepreneurŐs and investorŐs perspective</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">Discussion Leader:Ę Professor</span></b><span style="font-size: 21px"> </span><b><span style="font-size: 21px">Dennis Charlebois</span></b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 24px"><h2>ĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘ ĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘ Ę</h2></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 24px"><h2>Term Sheets &amp Risk Capital Investing </h2></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">Case</span></b><span style="font-size: 21px">:Ę Term Sheet Negotiations for Trendsetter</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 24px"><h2>Special Guest for Discussion of Case:Ę Prashant Shah</h2></span></b></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">Ę</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">This case describes two aspiring entrepreneurs who have just received term sheets from two venture capital firms.Ę With neither of the entrepreneurs having experience in raising capital, they are wondering how to compare the two proposals and which one they should choose.ĘĘĘ Please consider the following questions:</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 24px"><h2>ĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘĘ </h2></span></b></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">1.ĘĘĘĘ What questions would you pose to an expert such as an attorney or experienced investor to better understand the terms in the two term sheets?</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">2.ĘĘĘĘ Are there major differences between the two term sheets?Ę If so, which term sheet is better?</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">3.ĘĘĘĘ How would you seek to alter the terms in each term sheet during negotiations with each venture capitalist?Ę Which terms would you seek to alter first?</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">Ę</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 24px"><h2>Venture Investing, Stock Ownership, and Cap Tables </h2></span></b></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">In this section we will review the VC landscape, concepts in stock ownership, dilution, etc &amp the mechanics of building a capitalization table</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">Presentation &amp Discussion Đ </span><b><span style="font-size: 21px">Professor</span></b><span style="font-size: 21px"> </span><b><span style="font-size: 21px">Dennis Charlebois</span></b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">Ę</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 24px"><h2>Getting a Startup Off the Ground</h2></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 24px"><h2>Special Guest for Discussion:Ę Greg Moore (CEO of Fit 3D &amp WAIR; SCU Alum)</h2></span></b></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">Ę</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 24px"><h2>Preview of MuMate-DuPage Negotiating Exercise</h2></span></b></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">Presentation &amp Discussion Đ </span><b><span style="font-size: 21px">Professor Dennis Charlebois</span></b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">Ę</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 24px"><h2>Term Sheets Đ A Legal Perspective</h2></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 24px"><h2>Special Guest for Presentation/Discussion:Ę Laura Norris (Director, EntrepreneurŐs Law Clinic)</h2></span></b></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">Ę</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 24px"><h2>Review of Upcoming Assignments</h2></span></b></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">Presentation &amp Discussion Đ </span><b><span style="font-size: 21px">Professor Dennis Charlebois</span></b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">Ę</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 24px"><h2>Case Discussions</h2></span></b></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">Presentation &amp Discussion Đ </span><b><span style="font-size: 21px">Professor</span></b><span style="font-size: 21px"> </span><b><span style="font-size: 21px">Dennis Charlebois</span></b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">Case:Ę Jim Poss (pp. 105 - 112)Ę S&ampA</span></b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">Discussion Questions:</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">1.ĘĘĘĘ Evaluate the specific opportunity in the trash industry that SPC is ĘĘĘĘĘĘproposing to pursue. What are the pros &amp cons of taking the Vail order.Ę </span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">2.ĘĘĘĘ Assess the market-based strategy issues facing Jim:</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">oĘĘ Target market[s] selection</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">oĘĘ Market positioning</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">oĘĘ Market entry sequence</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">3.ĘĘĘĘ Evaluate JimŐs revenue projections</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">4.ĘĘĘĘ Evaluate JimŐs exit strategy</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 24px"><h2>Ę</h2></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 21px">Case:Ę Peloton (A, B)</span></b><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">Discussion Questions:</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">1.ĘĘĘĘ At one point, Foley decided to develop PelotonŐs own product designs and internal capabilities rather than adapting existing products to PelotonŐs needs and/or outsourcing key elements to third parties. Identify and discuss examples of this decision and explain the consequences for Peloton.</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">2.ĘĘĘĘ Identify and discuss the key elements of PelotonŐs customer value proposition.Ę </span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">3.ĘĘĘĘ ĘIdentify and assess PelotonŐs strategic decisions as they relate to bike design, recruiting trainers, retail operations, and PelotonŐs value chain.</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">4.ĘĘĘĘ Identify and discuss what you think are the 4 most important reasons why venture capitalists avoided investing in Peloton for many years.</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">5.ĘĘĘĘ Identify and discuss the characteristics of PelotonŐs business model that are driving PelotonŐs superior financial performance and competitive resilience?Ę </span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">Ę</span></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 24px"><h2>Readings:</h2></span></b></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">1.ĘĘĘĘ Chapter 14 [S&ampA]</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">2.ĘĘĘĘ Deal Structuring and Deal Terms (CP)</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">3.ĘĘĘĘ A Rich vs. King Approach to Term Sheet Negotiations (CP)ĘĘ </span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">4.ĘĘĘĘ Note on Developing Financial Projections for Startups and Growth BusinessesĘ (CAMINO)</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">5.ĘĘĘĘ The Sales Learning Curve (CP)</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">6.ĘĘĘĘ How To Define Your Target Market (CAMINO) </span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">7.ĘĘĘĘ Why the Lean Startup Changes Everything (CP)</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 21px">8.ĘĘĘĘ Article: ŇWant to Know How VCŐs Calculate Valuation Differently From Founders?ÓĘ Mark Suster.Ę 2010.</span></div>
<div><u><span style="font-size: 21px">9.ĘĘĘĘ </span></u><u><font color="#E4AF0A"><span style="font-size: 21px">http://www.bothsidesofthetable.com/2010/07/22/want-to-know-how-vcs-calculate-valuation-differently-from-founders/</span></font></u><u><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></u></div>
<div><u><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></u></div>
<div><b><u><span style="font-size: 30px">IMC Plan: Buyers</span></u></b><u><span style="font-size: 30px"><br></span></u></div>
<div><u><span style="font-size: 21px"><br></span></u></div>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 28px">What kind of experience do you have with marketing?</span></li>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 28px">I used to work for a start-up that focused on hardware</span><span style="font-size: 28px">,</span><span style="font-size: 28px"> and I</span></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 28px"> worked under the CEO as his marketing assistant. </span></li>
</ul>
</ul>
<div><span style="font-size: 28px"><br></span></div>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 28px">What is your undergraduate degree and where did you get it?</span></li>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 28px">Psychology from University of Phoenix</span></li>
</ul>
</ul>
<div><span style="font-size: 28px"><br></span></div>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 28px">What is your job title and who do you work for?</span></li>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 28px">IŐm a Group Manager of the Mid-Market Business Development Unit</span><span style="font-size: 28px"> </span><span style="font-size: 28px">@</span><span style="font-size: 28px"> S</span><span style="font-size: 28px">ense</span><span style="font-size: 27px"><br></span></li>
</ul>
</ul>
<div><span style="font-size: 27px"><br></span></div>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 27px">What is one key question you would like to have answered in this course?</span><span style="font-size: 27px"><br></span></li>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 27px">H</span><span style="font-size: 27px">ow </span><span style="font-size: 27px">I </span><span style="font-size: 27px">c</span><span style="font-size: 27px">an</span><span style="font-size: 27px"> </span><span style="font-size: 27px">w</span><span style="font-size: 27px">ork with my</span><span style="font-size: 27px"> marketing t</span><span style="font-size: 27px">eam to</span><span style="font-size: 27px"> be</span><span style="font-size: 27px">tter </span><span style="font-size: 27px">underst</span><span style="font-size: 27px">and </span><span style="font-size: 27px">ho</span><span style="font-size: 27px">w</span><span style="font-size: 27px"> </span><span style="font-size: 27px">I can </span><span style="font-size: 27px">sell to </span><span style="font-size: 27px">specific </span><span style="font-size: 27px">person</span><span style="font-size: 27px">as </span><span style="font-size: 27px">and write </span><span style="font-size: 27px">better sa</span><span style="font-size: 27px">les </span><span style="font-size: 27px">copy. </span><span style="font-size: 27px"><br></span></li>
</ul>
</ul>
<div><span style="font-size: 27px"><br></span></div>
<ul>
<ul>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 27px">M1: Discussion, </span><font color="#E4AF0A"><span style="font-size: 27px">Jan 13th</span></font><span style="font-size: 27px"> - 100 points</span><span style="font-size: 27px"> -</span><span style="font-size: 27px"> lb </span><span style="font-size: 27px">does </span><span style="font-size: 27px">today mn</span><span style="font-size: 27px"> </span><span style="font-size: 27px">review </span><span style="font-size: 27px">Wednesday </span><span style="font-size: 27px"><br></span></li>
<li><b><u><span style="font-size: 23px">M1: Steps in the Customer Journey Quiz</span></u></b><b><u><span style="font-size: 23px"> - </span></u></b><b><u><span style="font-size: 23px">to do</span></u></b><b><u><span style="font-size: 23px"> </span></u></b><b><u><span style="font-size: 23px">Tuesday</span></u></b><b><u><span style="font-size: 23px"> </span></u></b><b><u><span style="font-size: 23px">night</span></u></b><b><u><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></u></b></li>

<li><b><span style="font-size: 21px">M4: Measurement and Evaluation Quiz, (</span></b><b><font color="#E4AF0A"><span style="font-size: 21px">Due Feb 5 at 11:59pm</span></font></b><b><span style="font-size: 21px">, 100 points)</span></b></li>

<div><b><span style="font-size: 26px"><h2><br></h2></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 26px"><h2>Questions:</h2></span></b></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 23px">Think of an ad campaign that has had an effect on you, or one that particularly spoke to you. This does not have to be a recent ad campaign, but from any point in your life. Answer the following questions:Ę</span></div>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 23px">Which ad campaign comes to mind?Ę</span><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></li>
<ul>
<li><b><span style="font-size: 23px">AirPods with Spatial Audio + Music for a Sushi Restaurant | Apple</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 23px"> </span></b><b><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></b></li>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 23px">The </span><span style="font-size: 23px">ope</span><span style="font-size: 23px">ning scene </span><span style="font-size: 23px">is </span><span style="font-size: 23px">en</span><span style="font-size: 23px">ergeti</span><span style="font-size: 23px">c</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> </span><span style="font-size: 23px">and</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> </span><span style="font-size: 23px">full of </span><span style="font-size: 23px">co</span><span style="font-size: 23px">lor</span><span style="font-size: 23px">. </span><span style="font-size: 23px">The </span><span style="font-size: 23px">backgro</span><span style="font-size: 23px">und </span><span style="font-size: 23px">music with</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> </span><span style="font-size: 23px">singing </span><span style="font-size: 23px">voice </span><span style="font-size: 23px">brings g</span><span style="font-size: 23px">ood </span><span style="font-size: 23px">way of </span><span style="font-size: 23px">bran</span><span style="font-size: 23px">ding</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> a</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> Sushi </span><span style="font-size: 23px">R</span><span style="font-size: 23px">estau</span><span style="font-size: 23px">rant though</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> </span><span style="font-size: 23px">the name</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> of the son</span><span style="font-size: 23px">g </span><span style="font-size: 23px"> </span><span style="font-size: 23px">is differe</span><span style="font-size: 23px">nt th</span><span style="font-size: 23px">en the </span><span style="font-size: 23px">intention o</span><span style="font-size: 23px">f </span><span style="font-size: 23px">A</span><span style="font-size: 23px">pple </span><span style="font-size: 23px">AirPods with Spatial Audio</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> as </span><span style="font-size: 23px">the main ar</span><span style="font-size: 23px">ea but th</span><span style="font-size: 23px">en you </span><span style="font-size: 23px">see </span><span style="font-size: 23px">visuals </span><span style="font-size: 23px">of </span><span style="font-size: 23px">individuals</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> in the vid</span><span style="font-size: 23px">eo </span><span style="font-size: 23px">l</span><span style="font-size: 23px">istening </span><span style="font-size: 23px">to m</span><span style="font-size: 23px">usic</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> th</span><span style="font-size: 23px">rough</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> </span><span style="font-size: 23px">AirPods</span><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></li>
</ul>
</ul>
<li><b><span style="font-size: 23px">What type of impact did this have on you? It could be positive or negative.</span></b><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></li>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 23px">It </span><span style="font-size: 23px">was </span><span style="font-size: 23px">a positive</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> impact beca</span><span style="font-size: 23px">use the mus</span><span style="font-size: 23px">ic is</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> me</span><span style="font-size: 23px">llow, re</span><span style="font-size: 23px">laxing an</span><span style="font-size: 23px">d </span><span style="font-size: 23px">ha</span><span style="font-size: 23px">s </span><span style="font-size: 23px">me wantin</span><span style="font-size: 23px">g to dance </span><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></li>
</ul>
<li><b><span style="font-size: 23px">Why do you think this ad campaign had this type of effect?</span></b><span style="font-size: 23px">Ę</span><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></li>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 23px">It</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> </span><span style="font-size: 23px">has a n</span><span style="font-size: 23px">ice up</span><span style="font-size: 23px">beat sou</span><span style="font-size: 23px">nd with </span><span style="font-size: 23px">very </span><span style="font-size: 23px">nice</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> </span><span style="font-size: 23px">vis</span><span style="font-size: 23px">ual </span><span style="font-size: 23px">transition</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> between </span><span style="font-size: 23px">the</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> </span><span style="font-size: 23px">colorfu</span><span style="font-size: 23px">l b</span><span style="font-size: 23px">ac</span><span style="font-size: 23px">kgro</span><span style="font-size: 23px">und space whe</span><span style="font-size: 23px">re</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> </span><span style="font-size: 23px">Har</span><span style="font-size: 23px">ry </span><span style="font-size: 23px">and </span><span style="font-size: 23px">other act</span><span style="font-size: 23px">ors/ac</span><span style="font-size: 23px">tresse</span><span style="font-size: 23px">s </span><span style="font-size: 23px">a</span><span style="font-size: 23px">re dancing</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> an</span><span style="font-size: 23px">d vibing</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> with the s</span><span style="font-size: 23px">ound </span><span style="font-size: 23px">that is </span><span style="font-size: 23px">coming out </span><span style="font-size: 23px">of their </span><span style="font-size: 23px">AirPods</span><span style="font-size: 23px">. </span><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></li>
</ul>
</ul>
<div><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></div>
<ul>
<li><b><span style="font-size: 23px">M2</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 23px">: </span></b><span style="font-size: 23px">Pr</span><span style="font-size: 23px">oject Q</span><span style="font-size: 23px">&amp</span><span style="font-size: 23px">A D</span><span style="font-size: 23px">iscussion </span><span style="font-size: 23px">(</span><b><span style="font-size: 23px">January</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 23px"> </span></b><b><span style="font-size: 23px">2</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 23px">0th</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 23px"> at 1</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 23px">1:</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 23px">59PM</span></b><span style="font-size: 23px">)</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> </span><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></li>
<li><b><span style="font-size: 23px">M</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 23px">2:</span></b><span style="font-size: 23px"> </span><span style="font-size: 23px">Mes</span><span style="font-size: 23px">sage</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> S</span><span style="font-size: 23px">trate</span><span style="font-size: 23px">gi</span><span style="font-size: 23px">es </span><span style="font-size: 23px">and the Cu</span><span style="font-size: 23px">stomer Jour</span><span style="font-size: 23px">ney Quiz</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> (</span><b><span style="font-size: 23px">Jan </span></b><b><span style="font-size: 23px">22nd</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 23px"> at 1</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 23px">1:59</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 23px">pm</span></b><span style="font-size: 23px">)</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> </span><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></li>
<li><b><span style="font-size: 23px">M3:</span></b><span style="font-size: 23px"> Val</span><span style="font-size: 23px">ues and Et</span><span style="font-size: 23px">hics</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> Discussi</span><span style="font-size: 23px">on</span><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></li>
<li><b><span style="font-size: 23px">M3</span></b><b><span style="font-size: 23px">:</span></b><span style="font-size: 23px"> Ty</span><span style="font-size: 23px">meBank </span><span style="font-size: 23px">Case St</span><span style="font-size: 23px">udy</span><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></li>

<li><span style="font-size: 23px">M</span><span style="font-size: 23px">4:</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> Team</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> Assi</span><span style="font-size: 23px">gnment, S</span><span style="font-size: 23px">ection</span><span style="font-size: 23px">s </span><span style="font-size: 23px">I</span><span style="font-size: 23px">-</span><span style="font-size: 23px">IV</span><span style="font-size: 23px"> (</span><b><span style="font-size: 23px">Group</span></b><span style="font-size: 23px">)</span><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></li>
